entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Unpredictable water stress causing instability in production

entities.description: Regions characterized by low and unpredictable rainfall

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Process of improving plant traits for drought tolerance

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A nutrient that plays a role in water uptake and regulation

entities.name: WATER UPTAKE
entities.description: The process by which plants absorb water from the soil

entities.name: STOMATA CONTROL
entities.description: The regulation of water loss through plant stomata

entities.name: WATER RELATIONS
entities.description: The balance and movement of water within a plant

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of biomass produced to water used

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Research conducted in actual field conditions

entities.name: CONTROLLED EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Research conducted in a regulated environment

entities.name: AGROCLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The combination of climate and soil factors in a specific area
